description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a light wood frame and white front panels. The cabinet features two side doors and three central drawers, each with a small, square metallic handle. The top, sides, and base are finished in a natural wood grain, while the front panels are smooth and matte. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, also finished in a light wood tone, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout suitable for storage in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood and white cabinet with two doors, three drawers, and angled legs, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain white panel with no visible handles or drawer separations.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible drawers or doors.
description_view_2: Front view with all three central drawers and two side doors visible, each with a small metallic handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain and depth.
